arts.ttl: Aston Villa starting XI vs Man City predicted as big Ollie Watkins decision made
arts.sum: Villa starting XI vs City predicted: Martinez, Konsa, Carlos, Pau, Digne, Kamara, Tilelemans, Cash, McGinn, Rogers, Watkins. In front of him, Emery could name the same back four which stifled City for much of the match at Villa Park last term.

arts.ttl: Man Utd eye Atalanta's Ederson - Friday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester United eye Atalanta midfielder Ederson, West Ham lead race to sign Brighton's Evan Ferguson, Chelsea and Arsenal interested in RB Leipzig's Benjamin Sesko.

arts.ttl: Chelsea tipped to complete stunning transfer of Aston Villa star
arts.sum: Chelsea are having a brilliant season under manager Enzo Maresca. Nobody expected the Blues to be a part of the Premier League title race but they have surprised with their performances this season. They are currently just two points behind league leaders Liverpool and they have shown signs of improvements in almost all the positions. arts.ttl: “I’ve been very poor” – Aston Villa star unhappy with form, wants a title and more CL football
arts.sum: Aston Villa goalkeeper Emiliano Martínez claims he hasn’t had a good season with Unai Emery’s side so far. He had a detailed chat with ESPN Argentina and his comments are relayed by Olé. They state the 32-year-old is ‘self-critical’ of his own performances for Aston Villa this season. arts.ttl: Dwight Yorke takes Man Utd swipe as he makes 'massive' Aston Villa statement
arts.sum: Former Aston Villa and Manchester United striker Dwight Yorke has tipped the Villans to finish the higher of his two former clubs this season. Yorke, who began his career with Villa before joining United to become a treble winner, has made it clear that Unai Emery's men are the more likely of the two sides to finish in the top four after a more positive start to the season than the Red Devils.
